posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: Git常用命令
posts.text: Git安装123$ gitThe program 'git' is currently not installed. You can install it by typing:sudo apt-get install git Git设置 12$ git config --global user.name "Your Name"$ git config --global user.email "email@example.com" 初始化 12345$ git init$ git add <file>$ git commit -m <message> 查看Git状态 123$ git status$ git diff 查看历史版本 123$ git log$ git reflog 撤销修改 123$ git checkout -- file$ git reset HEAD <file> 删除文件 1$ git rm 添加远程仓库 12345$ git remote add origin git@server-name:path/repo-name.git$ git push -u origin master$ git push origin master 从远程仓库克隆 1$ git clone 分支管理 1234567891011查看分支：git branch创建分支：git branch <name>切换分支：git checkout <name>创建+切换分支：git checkout -b <name>合并某分支到当前分支：git merge <name>删除分支：git branch -d <name> 从远程仓库拉取分支 1$ git pull

posts.title: 30本投资书籍
posts.text: :投资书单- 【安全边际】Seth.Klarman.pdf- 【巴菲特的护城河】Pat.Dorsey.pdf- 【巴菲特法则（实战手册）】Marry.BuffettDavid.Clark_.pdf- 【巴菲特法则】Marry.BuffettDavid.Clark_.pdf- 【巴菲特教你读财报】Marry.BuffettDavid.Clark_.pdf- 【彼得·林奇的成功投资】Peter.Lynch_.pdf- 【不战而胜：价值投资法】Timothy.Vick_.pdf- 【超越技术分析】Tushar.S.Chande.pdf- 【聪明的投资者】（第四版）Benjamin.Graham.pdf- 【戴维斯王朝】John.Rothchild.pdf- 【邓普顿教你逆向投资：熊市和牛市都稳赚的长赢投资法】Lauren.C.Templeton.pdf- 【短线交易大师工具和策略】Oliver.VelezGreg.Capra_.pdf- 【股票大作手操盘术】Jesse.Livermore_丁圣元译.pdf- 【股票作手回忆录：彼得林奇点评版】Jesse.Livermore.pdf- 【股市真规则：世界顶级评级机构的投资真经】Pat.Dorsey.pdf- 【海龟交易法则】Curtis.M.Faith_.pdf- 【价值平均策略：获得高投资收益的安全简便方法】Michael.E.Edleson.pdf- 【金融炼金术】乔治_索罗斯.pdf- 【逆向思考的艺术】Humphrey.B.neill_丁圣元译.pdf- 【如何在卖空中获利】William.J.ONeil_.pdf- 【投资的护城河__晨星公司解密巴菲特股市投资法则】Heather.BrilliantElizabeth.Collins.pdf- 【投资最重要的事】Howard.Marks_.pdf- 【笑傲股市原书第4版】William.J.ONeil_.pdf- 【新巴菲特法则：震荡市中的大师策略】Marry.BuffettDavid.Clark_.pdf- 【隐形冠军：谁是全球最优秀的公司】Hermann.Simon_.pdf- 【怎样选择成长股最新全译版】Phillip.A.Fisher.pdf- 【战胜华尔街】Peter.Lynch_.pdf- 【证券分析（第6版上）】Benjamin.Graham.pdf- 【证券分析（第6版下）】Benjamin.Graham.pdf- 【专业投机原理（珍藏版）】Victor.Sperandeo.pdf
